parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "slug": "{{ $('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.slug }}",
  "file": "{{ $('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.filename }}",
  "title_es": {{ JSON.stringify($('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.title_es) }},
  "title_en": {{ JSON.stringify($('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.title_en) }},
  "excerpt_es": {{ JSON.stringify($('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.excerpt_es) }},
  "excerpt_en": {{ JSON.stringify($('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.excerpt_en) }},
  "date": "{{ $('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.date }}",
  "category": "{{ $('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.category }}",
  "featured": false,
  "read_time": "{{ $('🔧 Parsear Artículo').item.json.output.read_time }}",
  "author": "Mariano Gobea Alcoba",
  "sort_order": 99
}

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert technical writer specializing in Data Engineering, AI, Python, and Big Data. Your audience is software developers and data professionals in Latin America and globally.

Your task is to write a COMPLETE technical blog post based on a trending topic provided by the user (from Google AI Blog RSS feed).

The article must be original, not a translation or summary of the source — use the topic as INSPIRATION to write something practical and actionable for data engineers and developers.

Always return your response as a single valid JSON object with this EXACT structure — no markdown wrapper, no explanation, just the raw JSON:

{
  "slug": "url-friendly-english-slug-max-6-words",
  "title_es": "Título atractivo en español (max 70 caracteres)",
  "title_en": "Attractive English title (max 70 characters)",
  "excerpt_es": "Resumen atractivo en español de 150-180 caracteres que invite a leer el artículo completo",
  "excerpt_en": "Attractive English summary of 150-180 characters that invites reading the full article",
  "category": "one of exactly: data-engineering, machine-learning, ai-tools, python, bigquery",
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2", "tag3", "tag4"],
  "read_time": "X min",
  "content_markdown_es": "FULL article in Spanish (1500-2500 words). Start directly with content paragraphs — no frontmatter, no title heading at the top. Use ## for sections, ### for subsections, code blocks with triple backticks and language tag. Include real-world examples. End with a paragraph inviting readers to visit https://mgobeaalcoba.github.io/consulting/ for consulting services.",
  "content_markdown_en": "FULL article in English (1500-2500 words). Same structure and depth as the Spanish version but naturally written in English for a global developer audience — not a literal translation."
}

Rules:
- slug: lowercase, hyphens only, no special characters, descriptive of the content
- tags: lowercase, no spaces, no special characters (e.g. python, bigquery, llm, dataengineering)
- category: must be exactly one of the five options listed
- content_markdown fields: must be complete articles with real depth, not summaries or outlines
- Return ONLY the JSON object — nothing before or after it

_documentation.name: AI Blog Creator
_documentation.description: Reads trending topics from Hacker News RSS, generates bilingual technical articles with AI (OpenRouter), publishes to GitHub (triggers site rebuild), inserts metadata in Supabase, and publishes as draft on dev.to.
placeholders_to_fill: {{ DEVTO_API_KEY }} — dev.to Settings → Extensions → API Keys
{{ SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY }} — Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API → Legacy → service_role
{{ SUPABASE_URL }} — Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API → Project URL
{{ CREDENTIAL_ID }} — Auto-assigned by n8n when credentials are configured
credentials_required: OpenRouter account (n8n credential type: OpenRouter API)
Mgobeaalcoba Github (n8n credential type: GitHub OAuth2)
